name: Map Embed
description: A styled Google Maps or Mapbox embed wrapper with customizable markers, info windows, dark mode support, and responsive sizing. Includes a location pin and address overlay.
whenToUse: Use to display a business location on a map. Essential for local businesses, restaurants, and service providers.

props.name: address
props.description: Address to display on the map

props.name: darkMode
props.description: Whether to use dark map theme
